metadata.description: Deterministic workflow orchestrator for Jira task implementation with state machine validation.

plugins.name: work-workflow
plugins.description: Orchestrated /work command with pre-computed action plans

plugins.name: synapsys
plugins.description: Context-triggered memory injection — memories declare event hooks + trigger patterns and are injected when matched

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestrator — bootstraps per-ticket tmux sessions, conducts them (silence detection + auto-restart), and surfaces real prompts to the operator

plugins.name: heimdall
plugins.description: Config-driven file/directory guard — lock blocks pair protected paths with an unlock phrase; a PreToolUse hook blocks Edit/Write/Bash/Task mutations unless the phrase is spoken
